title: salvia × sylvestris subsp. amplexicaulis
intro: Salvia × sylvestris subsp. amplexicaulis, also known as woodland sage, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting respiratory health. Salvia × sylvestris subsp. amplexicaulis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a popular herbal remedy for its potential therapeutic benefits.
